sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Bawngte hamna aw in naungek phawng zel hi,
Hih hang naungek Jesuh lah kapse lo hi;
Jesuh aw Nang kong ngaih mah bangin,
Van pan hong en in khuavak dong hong kem in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ko kiangah naitakin hong ompih inla,
Ka Topa Jesuh aw, kei hong ngai inla;
khempeuh tu’n hong kem hong cing in,
Na kiangah om thei dingin hong bawlpha in.
